display_name: 团队办公室角色包 GUI 用户视角场景候选
purpose: 约束后续前端、基座和云端验收必须由用户视角智能体只通过 GUI 操作完成，组织者只记录证据、协调缺口和回填问题。

steps: open role studio from product navigation
click create role
type secretary general display name, target slot, style summary and decision boundary
add forbidden phrases for approval, execution, sending and formalization claims
save candidate and observe candidate-only state
create strategy advisor through GUI
create product advisor through GUI
create operations advisor through GUI
create finance advisor through GUI
create legal risk advisor through GUI
verify each advisor compatible slot in preview
open capability pack workbench from GUI
select role requirement section
choose secretary and advisor role requirements from installed or candidate role list
attempt incompatible role selection and observe block
save capability role requirement candidate
success_assertions: capability pack does not copy role pack body
capability pack does not change team settings

steps: open team settings
switch to role or office tab
select secretary slot and replace role
select five advisor slots and replace roles
confirm Owner Gate
observe binding receipt refs
success_assertions: history and previous receipts are not rewritten

steps: open secretary role appearance settings
select voice from GUI option list
select VRM from GUI option list
clear selection and restore default
observe provider readiness state
success_assertions: raw local file path is rejected
provider_missing or not_ready is shown honestly when renderer is unavailable

scenarios.entry_surface: Role Studio Export And Cloud Listing
steps: click prepare listing from role studio
upload candidate bundle to cloud draft through GUI
open cloud listing draft and run sandbox purchase
observe sandbox payment receipt and entitlement candidate
download signed artifact from purchased page
install downloaded artifact through local TruzhenOS GUI
open team settings and verify installed role appears as replaceable option
success_assertions: team binding still requires Owner Gate

steps: type approval or execution claim into role style and try to save
select finance advisor for legal risk slot and observe compatibility block
choose raw local voice path and observe asset rejection
attempt download without entitlement
attempt install with tampered artifact hash
attempt real payment in non-authorized environment
success_assertions: incompatible role replacement is blocked or requires high-risk Owner confirmation
real payment without Owner authorization is blocked

non_completion_clause: 本文件只定义用户视角 GUI 测试场景候选；未产生截图、页面状态、候选 ID、Receipt 或 blocked 证据前，不得声称 GUI E2E、云购买、下载或安装通过。
